meaning: n.阿比西尼亚(非洲东部国家,首都Addis Ababa)
examples: This leads to the Abyssinia Crisis.
The League of Nations' sanctions did not protect Abyssinia against fascist Italy.
Journeys to Abyssinia, Scandinavia and Siberia both interrupted and enriched the work.
Some 6, 000 Italians were killed in the disastrous battle of Adowa in Abyssinia in 1896.
Poncet's peregrinations take him to Egypt, across the Sinai and the mountains of Abyssinia, then again to Versailles and back.
